comment: I can never tell which vendor checklist is the latest version.
We answer the same document naming questions every week.
Invoice status is split between email and spreadsheets.
Remote approval steps are not obvious for new managers.
The support playbook exists, but agents do not search it first.
A short training video is easier than reading the full policy.
AI summaries are useful only if they cite the exact source.
The demo guide should tell users what to ask first.
